soft_flags.description: Halloween imagery (skeleton, face paint) — cultural appropriateness for Saudi audience should be considered; skeleton styling is Western secular holiday reference. Not a hard violation but worth noting for conservative market segments.

cultural_notes.free_notes: This is a seasonal/festive campaign post leveraging Western Halloween aesthetic. While not culturally sensitive to conservative Islamic values, it reflects brand personality and may resonate with younger, urban demographic. The skeleton mascot serves as brand personality extension. Production quality is high with deliberate creative direction.
